.marquee {
  --gap: 0.25rem;
  display: flex;
  overflow: hidden;
  user-select: none;
  gap: var(--gap);
}

.marquee_content {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-around;
  min-width: 100%;
  gap: var(--gap);
  animation: 20s linear infinite scroll;
  list-style: none;
}

@keyframes scroll {
  0%    { transform: translateX(100%); }
  100%  { transform: translateX(0%); }
}
